# Contributing to Emblyx Products

Thank you for your interest in helping improve Emblyx products.

## Before Opening an Issue

Please make sure you:

* Use the latest available firmware version.
* Check existing issues to avoid duplicates.
* Provide enough information to help us understand and investigate your request.

## Bug Reports

When reporting a bug, please include:

* Product Name
* Product ID
* Hardware Revision and Firmware Version
* Steps to Reproduce
* Expected Behavior
* Actual Behavior
* Relevant Logs, Screenshots, or Videos

### Where to Find Device Information

You can obtain the required device information from:

**ESP RainMaker App**

* Node Information

  * Node ID (Product ID)
  * Hardware Revision
  * Firmware Version

**Web Dashboard**

* Statistics

  * Chip Identifier (Product ID)
  * Hardware Revision
  * Firmware Version

Providing detailed information helps us investigate and resolve issues more efficiently.

## Feature Requests

We welcome suggestions for improving Emblyx products.

When submitting a feature request, please include:

* The problem you are trying to solve
* Your proposed solution
* The expected benefit or use case

## Questions

If you have a question about an Emblyx product, please include:

* Product Name
* A clear description of your question
* Any relevant screenshots, logs, or additional information

Providing context helps us answer your question more quickly and accurately.

## Security Issues

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public issues.

Instead, contact us directly at:

[support@emblyx.com](mailto:support@emblyx.com)

## Documentation

Before opening an issue, please review the available product documentation, user manuals, and setup guides.

## Community Guidelines

Please be respectful and constructive when interacting with other users and contributors.

We appreciate your feedback, questions, and suggestions in helping make Emblyx products better.
